name: Service Bus Tours
districts_or_customers: NY Metro area camps, schools, corporations, seniors groups, churches
recent_news: Long-tenured family business (since 1937/1939 per site); shares 756 Nepperhan Ave address in Yonkers with SuperSelby (a 150+ bus family operator) suggesting possible co-location or operational ties; servicetours.com displays a 'domain for sale' note, ambiguous signal worth diligence.
fit_notes: Yonkers-based legacy school/charter operator with ~85-year history; aging founder-led structure suggests strong succession angle. Co-location with SuperSelby (already large NYC-area school bus consolidator) raises question of whether Service Bus Tours is still independent or already affiliated — diligence required before outreach.

name: Kelly's Transit
districts_or_customers: 25+ school districts across York County and Adams County, PA
recent_news: Long-running SPED specialist established at the request of Lincoln IU 12 in 1978; no public M&A or litigation noted; site emphasizes special-needs niche.
fit_notes: High-quality PA SPED tuck-in: dedicated special-needs contractor with sticky IU-12 relationship and 25+ district footprint in York/Adams counties — directly adjacent to Summit's PA platform. Founder-named operation (Marvin Kelly) suggests credible succession window.

name: Jennings Transportation
districts_or_customers: Nazareth Area School District (primary, since founding)
recent_news: First hybrid (plug-in) school bus in Pennsylvania, received from IC Corporation/Advanced Energy for 2006-2007 SY; 2024 incident — local schools/daycares put on lockdown after a man told Jennings employees he 'needed to' take a bus (no Jennings wrongdoing).
fit_notes: Lehigh Valley 2nd/3rd-gen family operator with anchor Nazareth ASD contract and ~91-vehicle fleet — clean PA tuck-in profile. 3rd gen already active (Jon/Meghan), which lowers immediate succession urgency but does not preclude a liquidity event for matriarch Janet. Innovation history (PA's first hybrid) suggests well-run operation.

name: Bedford Charter Svc
districts_or_customers: Bedford Public Schools (MA) implied primary contract
recent_news: No M&A, sale, or significant news identified; safety-focused messaging (monthly safety meetings, CORI certification, random drug testing); owns in-house 48' x 106' six-bay maintenance facility.
fit_notes: Small but well-run Greater Boston operator (68 yrs old, owner-operated, in-house maintenance). Outside Summit's named expansion states per source data (expansion_state=0) but MA cluster has rising consolidator interest; owner-led structure (John Martines) implies strong succession angle. Likely a tuck-in only if Summit prioritizes New England density.

name: D W Clark & Son
districts_or_customers: Sussex County, NJ tri-state area schools (Franklin Boro, Hardyston, Sussex County Technical School referenced in local resources)
recent_news: No M&A or significant news identified; D&B and Manta confirm continued operation at 3010 State Rt 23, Franklin, NJ; small owner-operated tri-state school bus contractor.
fit_notes: Small NJ tri-state operator (~40-50 employees, Sussex County footprint) with the eponymous '& Son' branding suggesting multigenerational family ownership now led by Houghtaling. Outside Summit's named expansion list (expansion_state=0) but NJ proximity to PA platform is attractive; size is sub-scale on its own — better as bolt-on to a larger NJ acquisition than a standalone platform.
